title: Minecraft Trailers Plus
description: The most complete and accurate Trailers Vision modpack there is.
body:
![Simple Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/140552bf6252fbcd9800d93c587f5e22778b6117.png)

Welcome to the most complete vanilla plus experience yet! The Trailer plus modpack introduces over 300 mods that improve upon the vanilla game without taking away that vanilla feel. This modpacks works alongside the Trailers Vision and BareBones resource packs to bring the closest and most accurate experience to the Minecraft Trailers ever.

This Modpack contains mods that improve on every aspect of the vanilla game with an amazing trailer like gameplay. Adding mods that overhaul survival gameplay, mobs, building blocks, world generation and more! This modpack brings various quality of life improvements to further enhance the gameplay without it being distracting or changing the feel of the vanilla game.

With the inclusion of amazing mods such as the Eternal Starlight, Aether, Bosses of Mass Destruction and more, the game expands its content even more without ever braking that Trailer like feel, thanks to the various resource packs used (even some created by myself) and the tons of enhancements this pack brings.

All credit goes to the amazing creators that made this modpack possible! Make sure to include the options.txt file as this has the best order for the resourcepacks to work correctly. Feel free to make any changes!
